overall.description: Aerial drone footage navigating through a futuristic cyberpunk metropolis at night, showcasing neon-lit skyscrapers, holographic billboards, and descending toward a metro station entrance. The clip is captured from Cyberpunk 2077, featuring the distinctive teal and magenta neon aesthetic of Night City.

segments.scene_description: The segment opens with an aerial view of a futuristic city at night, flying between towering skyscrapers adorned with neon lights. A large pink holographic billboard dominates the right side as the camera drifts forward and downward through the urban canyon.

segments.scene_description: The camera moves close to a building facade featuring a prominent 'All night Every Night' billboard, then descends past neon strip lighting toward a rooftop with mechanical equipment. Palm trees become visible in the background as the drone approaches roof level.

segments.scene_description: The drone enters a dark, enclosed corridor with teal neon strip lighting on the walls, moving toward a glass entrance. The blue 'CHARTER HILL' neon sign becomes visible in the distance as the camera approaches the station entrance.

segments.scene_description: The camera emerges into the Charter Hill station entrance, revealing the bright blue neon sign, glass doors, and a few pedestrians. The scene shows a sheltered plaza with benches where people are seated, and the camera descends to focus on the individuals waiting near the entrance.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous aerial descent from the towering heights of a neon-lit cyberpunk skyline down into the intimate bustle of a metro station entrance. It begins by drifting through an urban canyon of skyscrapers, passing a massive pink holographic billboard as the camera glides forward and downward. As the drone descends, it brushes past a building facade featuring an All Night Every Night sign and moves toward a rooftop cluttered with mechanical equipment and distant palm trees. The scene then shifts into a dark, enclosed corridor illuminated by teal neon strips, guiding the camera toward a glowing blue Charter Hill sign. Finally, the movement opens into a sheltered plaza, descending past glass doors to focus on pedestrians seated on benches near the station entrance.
